gist.headline: Watering the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, updating health checks and metrics for all the community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and greenhouse documentation up to date with the latest health and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about automated metrics and health checks for the 'greenhouse' (community apps). The pollinations bee (Polly) and the Monitor Robot checking on plants (apps) with a clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. The robot holds a tiny clipboard with pixelated checkmarks. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
